inputs.global_prompt: 末日废土电影质感，冷色调低饱和，轻微手持呼吸晃动，自然动态模糊，发丝、布料、血液细微动态，空气中漂浮微尘，画面有机流畅，胶片颗粒，景深虚化，紧张压抑的末日氛围，人物微肌肉动态，无僵硬定格感。 背景僵尸移动。

inputs.local_prompts: 咀嚼声 | Memory flash cut dynamic picture-in-picture shot. Vertical phone screen floats in center frame, subtle slight screen jitter and faint pixel flicker of old recorded video. Young man inside screen has obvious slight body trembling, rapid natural facial micro-expression change, eyes glistening with suppressed panic. Dark surrounding space has slow floating dust particles, cold ambient light faintly fluctuates. Warm screen light casts tiny dynamic light spot on dark background. Soft frame flicker fits memory flash effect. Mouth moves naturally as speaking. Smoothly connect subsequent real scene footage. | Medium close-up dynamic shot, slow subtle push lens with slight anti-shake sway. Woman swings back hand swiftly to wipe blood off mouth, obvious motion blur traces follow wiping gesture. Hair strands float gently with small airflow disturbance, jacket fabric folds slightly shake.  | Left wrist slowly turns toward camera, matte black countdown watch displays glowing green digital number, indicator light has faint regular flicker. Blurred zombie background keeps slow swaying movement. All body actions smooth and coherent, no stiff pause. Mouth moves naturally. Seamless transition to follow-up frame.
